en: Wally, what were you thinking?
ko: 월리, 무슨 생각을 하고 있었던 거야?

en: I'm only kidding.
I'm only kidding, eh?
Hey, look, do me a favour and get Denborn Bug past security.
ko: 이봐, 부탁이 있는데 덴본 버그를 보안 통과시켜줘.

en: They want to go on the pitch, take a few snaps and all that, yeah?
ko: 그들이 경기장에 가서 사진 몇 장 찍고 싶어 하거든, 그렇지?

en: I'd rather them not.
Yeah, they just want to look around it, Wally.
ko: 응, 그들은 그냥 둘러보고 싶어 하는 거야, 월리.

en: Take a second.
I'd rather them not.
What?
What, you're not going to go little moody bitch
ko: 뭐, 삐져서 유세 떨 생각은 아니지

en: just because you got your arse served to you on a plate, are you?
Don't speak to me like that.
Huh? Don't speak to me like that.
OK, well, let's see if you can hear this, hmm?
ko: 좋아, 그럼 네가 이걸 들을 수 있는지 보자, 응?

en: You know that Ickle TV show you made?
ko: 네가 만든 그 유치한 TV 쇼 있잖아?

en: It just made it easier for Manchester City to kick you to the kerb.
ko: 그게 맨체스터 시티가 너를 내쫓기 쉽게 만들었어.

en: And look where you are now.
ko: 그리고 지금 네가 어디에 있는지 봐.

en: Twaddling about with a bunch of amateurs.
No offence, no offence. Eh?
Don't turn your back on me, you pussy.
ko: 나한테 등을 돌리지 마, 겁쟁이야. 오! 아!

en: Oh! Ah!
Oh! Ah! Oh!
